title: Dvd set
wikitext:
[]: Dvd set             Quote Post by Janoski » Wed Jan 28, 2015 11:24 pm So i'm pretty new to the forums and I am not sure where I should post this so I'm sorry if I am posting in the wrong section. I just want to ask where I could get a legit platinum set for Eva since I found one thread on redit saying that most of the ones at Ebay or Amazon are fake. I am getting the perfect box set (2002 release) just for the sake of collecting now I guess since I heard the quality is pretty bad. And also The End of Evangelion one. I just want to get a platinum one for a fairly reasonable price. Think you could help me?

[]:             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Thu Jan 29, 2015 7:09 am I'd say just wait for the new Blu Ray/DVD release...if that ever gets released outside of Japan. You should be able to find more legit ones on eBay and such now though, since the Blu Ray set was announced I've seen heaps of them.

[]: Re: Dvd set             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jan 29, 2015 10:25 am FullMetalBiscuit wrote: I'd say just wait for the new Blu Ray/DVD release...if that ever gets released outside of Japan.

[]: Re: Dvd set             Quote Post by Dataprime » Thu Jan 29, 2015 10:44 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Yeah, IF . And if it does, that could be another 2-3 years from now.

[]: Re: Dvd set             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jan 29, 2015 10:54 am The Eva Monkey wrote: The clear cases are a dead giveaway ,

[]: Re: Dvd set             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Jan 29, 2015 1:57 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The clear cases are a dead giveaway , I also look for the weird lower serif on the G in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Janoski » Thu Jan 29, 2015 2:39 pm Yeah I haven't seen the photos so I was worried but I found a couple ones that are legit and I'm choosing between them since some of them have dents, scratches on the cover cases etc. And thanks for the link I'm actually watching a few of them already since yesterday. Too bad the one with platinum covers are too expensive. I should be good with this one for now since I'm pretty much just starting to collect. http://www.ebay.com/itm/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Platinum-The-Complete-Collection-DVD-2005-/331460078661?pt=LH_DefaultDomain_0&hash=item4d2c8f6c45 This one looks pretty nice but no box.
